response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is entirely in full-stack web and mobile development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive software engineering experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Demonstrated ability to lead and teach through workshops and community projects
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture for AI accelerators
Lacks background in deep learning performance optimization or GPU workload analysis
Education and career history show no alignment with cloud infrastructure or hardware manufacturing domains
